plan_adherence_notes: Execution kept the already-landed service-index and baseline `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` assertions in place and added the missing probability-edit-only 404 regression, plus a small shared projection helper in `backend/server.py`. It did not add the planned deterministic replay-order regression or any of the representative `unrealizedPnl` regressions for multi-fill accumulation, partial close survivors, or sign-flip survivors.
reason: The research and plan were strong, but the branch only partially executed them. `backend/server.py` still exposes a minimal positions serializer with no `unrealizedPnl`, and `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` still lacks deterministic replay-order coverage and the requested exact P&L regressions. Targeted unittest coverage for the existing service-index and `/positions` cases passed in this environment.
